api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behav.title: Class FloatingBehaviorEngine | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behav.summary: Class FloatingBehaviorEngine This class handles all the behaviors each spawned floating text object has. It will update all behaviors and remove them when finished until no more behaviors are left. This class also handles the objects return to the object pool. Inheritance object FloatingBehaviorEngine Namespace: BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behaviors.Engine Assembly: Assembly-CSharp.dll Syntax public class FloatingBehaviorEngine : MonoBehaviour Constructors FloatingBehaviorEngine() Declaration public FloatingBehaviorEngine() Methods With(IFloatingBehavior) Adds a new behavior. Returns Type Description FloatingBehaviorEngine WithPreset(List<IFloatingBehavior>) Adds a new preset from the FloatingPresets class. Declaration public FloatingBehaviorEngine WithPreset(List<IFloatingBehavior> preset) Parameters Type Name Description List<IFloatingBehavior> preset The preset. Returns Type Description FloatingBehaviorEngine See Also UnityEngine.MonoBehaviour

api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behav.title: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behaviors | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behav.summary: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingText.Behaviors Classes ColorGradientBehavior This behavior will take 2 colors and lerp between them. ExpandShrinkBehavior This behavior will scale up and then down for the specified amount of times. FadeOutBehavior This behavior will fade out the text over the specified duration. FloatingBehaviors This wrapper class hides the "new" calls for each behavior. This needs to be updated when a new behavior is implemented. Pass these methods into the .With() function from the FloatingBehaviorEngine class. IFloatingBehavior Interface class for all floating text behaviors. Implement this class to define new behavior components. MoveUpArcBehavior This behavior moves up and in an arc. The arc is determined by the random x value within the "arcSpread" value. MoveUpBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis. MoveUpExpandBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis then expands after movement has finished. PopBehavior This behavior scales up quickly and then slowly scales down over time. ScaleToBehavior This behavior scales to the value passed in. ShakeBehavior This behavior will cause the floating text to shake for a specified duration. ShakeXBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to shake along the x axis. WobbleBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to rotate back and forth on the z axis.

api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.title: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors | Floating Text API
api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Behaviors Classes ColorGradientBehavior This behavior will take 2 colors and lerp between them. ExpandShrinkBehavior This behavior will scale up and then down for the specified amount of times. FadeOutBehavior This behavior will fade out the text over the specified duration. FloatingBehaviorEngine This class handles all the behaviors each spawned floating text object has. It will update all behaviors and remove them when finished until no more behaviors are left. This class also handles the objects return to the object pool. FloatingBehaviors This wrapper class hides the "new" calls for each behavior. This needs to be updated when a new behavior is implemented. Pass these methods into the .With() function from the FloatingBehaviorEngine class. IFloatingBehavior Interface class for all floating text behaviors. Implement this class to define new behavior components. MoveUpArcBehavior This behavior moves up and in an arc. The arc is determined by the random x value within the "arcSpread" value. MoveUpBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis. MoveUpExpandBehavior This behavior moves up in the Y axis then expands after movement has finished. PopBehavior This behavior scales up quickly and then slowly scales down over time. ScaleToBehavior This behavior scales to the value passed in. ShakeBehavior This behavior will cause the floating text to shake for a specified duration. ShakeXBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to shake along the x axis. WobbleBehavior This behavior causes the floating text to rotate back and forth on the z axis.

api/BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.summary: Namespace BlackMassSoftware.FloatingTextEngine.Presets Classes FloatingTextPresets This optional class has predefined behaviors so the user can call them directly for common behaviors. This prevents the user from having to build their own based on the intended behavior. Enums EFloatingDamageType Built in floating damage types that can be used in the MagicDamage preset.
